# Sword of Oryx
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Sword%20of%20Oryx&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Sword of Oryx
| slot = sword
| tier = UT
| rarity = l
| desc = This sword comes from the deepest of mountains, the highest of oceans. Straight from the sky.

| rof = 105
| range = yes
| projSpeed = 12
| lifetime = 350
| minDmg = 265
| maxDmg = 340
| fameb = 7
| feedp = 1400

| legendary = 4

|lootbag = white
|dropsFrom = is obtainable via Oryx The Mad God 3.}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Swords]]
{{NavSwords}}
</noinclude>
